title: New Academic Session Starts July 2026
content: We are excited to announce that admissions are now open for the upcoming academic session. Students can choose from a wide range of courses including Tally, AutoCAD, and Web Development. Early bird discounts available.

title: Tally Prime Certification Update
content: All students enrolled in the Tally Prime course must complete their final practical examination by May 30th. Certification will be issued within 7 days of the exam completion.
